title: Commenting spreadsheet errors
description: Comments spreadsheet cells with formula errors.

title: Creating presentation
description: Creates presentation with multiple slides, images and text.

title: Creating basic form
description: Creates basic form with text and image inputs.

title: Creating advanced form
description: Creates advanced form with table structure.

title: Filling form
description: Fills form with text values and image.

title: Generating user feedback report
description: Creates an XLSX report with average scores, highlighted negative comments, individual ratings, and charts.

title: Generating invoice from order data
description: Creates a PDF invoice with customer details, itemized order, pricing, and tax-inclusive totals.

title: Generating employment agreement
description: Creates a personalized PDF employment agreement from HR form data and saves it to DocSpace for signing and storage.

title: Generating personalized investment plan
description: Creates an XLSX investment plan with projections and charts tailored to the client's financial goals and input data.

title: Generating inventory report
description: Creates an XLSX report with current stock items, including quantities and status indicators.

title: Creating startup market analysis presentation
description: Generates a presentation with market trends, competition, and customer insights using integrated external data.

title: Creating commercial offer
description: Generates a personalized commercial offer in DOCX format with client-specific products, services, and timelines.

title: Creating employee training plan
description: Generates a structured DOCX training plan with learning goals, deadlines, and resources for each employee.

title: Creating annual business report
description: Generates a DOCX annual report with financial performance, key achievements, and strategic highlights based on external data.
